name: Physicochemical and Biochemical Properties of Echinometra fimbriata Oocytes in Senegal (2014)
description: Dataset containing environmental parameters (temperature, salinity) and biochemical measurements (dry mass, volume, lipids, protein, calorific content, elemental ratios Ba/Ca, Sr/Ca, Zn/Ca) of Echinometra fimbriata oocytes. Data includes sample IDs, event locations (Foundiougne), and precise geographic coordinates (Latitude, Longitude) collected in January 2014.
